title: Large Bamboo Chopping Board - 24cm x 34cm, Made from Strong and Durable Bamboo, Wooden Cutting Board for Kitchens, Meat, Vegetables and Bread, Serving Tray, Kitchen Utensil Accessory
features: 🔪🌿🥩🥕 BAMBOO CHOPPING BOARD FOR EVERYDAY USAGE - Add a touch of style to your kitchen with this beautiful bamboo chopping board. The board is made from strong bamboo and is superb for cutting meats, vegetables and breads on. The fine grain of the bamboo also minimises the appearance of cutting marks and helps your knives stay sharp so your food preparation remains easy

🔪🌿🥩🥕 MADE FROM STRONG, NATURAL AND DURABLE BAMBOO - This attractive chopping board is made from bamboo which is a wood that is renowned for its exceptional durability and strength. By choosing this material for our chopping board we were trying to ensure it would withstand daily kitchen use without warping or splintering

🔪🌿🥩🥕 EASY TO CLEAN AND HANG UP - Cleaning this bamboo chopping board couldn't be simpler. You need only wash it with warm water and soap after use. Ensure it is dried thoroughly and it can then be hung up from the useful ring attached to the board, this fantastic feature also ensures the board doesn't take up valuable shelf or cupboard space

🔪🌿🥩🥕 VERSATILE AND BEAUTIFUL SERVING TRAY - The bamboo board is not just for chopping, it can also be used as an attractive serving tray. Whether you're making a special effort for mother's day or have whipped up a lovely breakfast for a wedding anniversary this board won't let you down

🔪🌿🥩🥕 INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - One bamboo chopping board with a silver ring attachment for easy carrying or hanging. The chopping board measures approximately 34cm x 24cm (13.3" x 9.4") and is made from strong bamboo. The board has been designed so that both professional and novice chefs can use it with ease
description: This package includes one bamboo chopping board which measures 24m x 34cm. This board is easy to store as there is a handy ring attached it which means the kitchen utensil can be hung up on a nail or peg when not in use. Our serving tray is made from natural bamboo which is a wood that is renowned for its strength and durability, we designed the board from this material so that we knew it would stand up to the harsh rigours of daily kitchen use.
